title: stevia gratioloides
intro: Stevia gratioloides, also known as Stevia rebaudiana var. gratioloides, is a plant species within the Stevia genus that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is renowned for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including high blood pressure, diabetes, and inflammation, due to the presence of compounds like stevioside and rebaudioside. The health benefits associated with Stevia gratioloides include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce blood sugar levels, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Stevia gratioloides is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in the form of supplements, to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
